data.body: BACKGROUND: The merge state detection ecosystem spans 5+ components patched independently over several iterations, creating a fragile multi-layer workaround stack. Components: (1) resolve-conflicts skill uses git diff --diff-filter=U to detect conflicts — exits early when auto-resolve stages files but MERGE_HEAD still exists. (2) pre-commit-review-gate.sh detects MERGE_HEAD and filters incoming-only files via merge-base. (3) compute-diff-hash.sh detects MERGE_HEAD to scope diff to worktree-only changes. (4) capture-review-diff.sh same MERGE_HEAD detection. (5) merge-to-main.sh _auto_resolve_archive_conflicts stages files so --diff-filter=U returns empty while rebase is still in progress.
